item.title: FACT CHECK - 100% Rage Bait
item.description:
Surprise! A captioned screenshot isn't actually true! Watch the video and you'll see she is actually saying: "You need to start calculating sustainability because the Earth isnt an infinite resource to trash"
Progressive Leftist here, I obviously don't support the neoliberal late-stage capitalist hellscape we live in...but I also don't support rage-baited disinformation. She's not saying we need to monetize breathing. Think about how ridiculous that statement sounds...it's because it's precisely intended to evoke rage and anger. She's saying that we need to protect our planet. This is Lindsay Hooper from Cambridge's Institute for Sustainability Leadership, while I don't agree with her advising how to maintain a capitalist mode of production, I do agree that we have to understand how precious our planet's resources are and continuing as we are is unsustainable and bring about ruinous destruction.
item.dc:creator: spittleteets

item.title: Do You Really Want This?
item.description: How is this "America First" if Cheeto Mussolini and MAJORITY of Congress is working for another country to make them into a SUPERPOWER? Being a SUPERPOWER is a zero-sum game! America will inevitably cease to be a superpower if Israel controls 40% of world's oil supply. Best case scenario, America will only hold power by proxy. Tech bros are not bound by geopolitics. They don't care. Palantir, Oracle, Apple, Meta, AWS they will go where infrastructure favor them. Any industrial level capitalism dgaf about you nor they are obligated. They will all leave you to rot in the hellscape they have build for you. MAGA or not, this concerns YOU! Keep that in mind.

item.dc:creator: ElbowDeepInATrend

item.title: Fuck it, here’s a song I’m working on
item.description: FRONT PAGE EDIT: Cannot thank you all enough for the kind words and encouragement. I've been at such a low I really needed the boost. I want to keep sharing with all y'all who would want to keep up, so if you wanna give me a follow or go to my linktree and find me elsewhere, please do. I'm excited to use a couple of my own works as assignments/practice for my last quarter at school (audio engineering), and I'm excited to share the results. To the person who said Imgur is not like Tiktok or Insta, holy hell you were correct. I meant it in the way of "I'm posting to no one here, so may as well post to no one there," just to realize OH I am not posting to no one. It's so refreshing to know there's a pocket online where the community means something, without the need for paid advertisements or where algorithms are working against you. This is the first time I felt like I shared to a real group of people. I'm definitely going to go to open mics around town, even if I don't have the guts to perform again yet, but I think some folks were right about needing to go out in the real world because the community surely is there. Just scary for me (chronic dissociation issues, socialization is hard). I want to post regularly here, but I don't want to be annoying, so maybe I'll leave it to once a week or something, idk, I'll figure it out. Bear with me as my stuff gets kinda weird, but it's honest to me and it's who I am as an artist. THANK YOU again for the support. I feel a little more real today <3. www.linktr.ee/innerwilds Original Post ---------- Yesterday I made a big long post about my feelings, about dissociation, and the pain of sharing music to no one versus the pain of keeping it all in. If you’re interested in that, go give it a read. A few people said “share” so what the hell. It’s no different posting it here than on TikTok or Insta or YouTube. I wrote this one a couple of days ago because I’ve been stuck in this mentally unwell cycle for years, I know it’s no one else’s job to fix me, but I really don’t know how to move forward on my own either. I just keep thinking I’ll figure it out someday. It’s not at full release yet, but I intend to share a stripped and full version. ALSO ITS BODY PAINT I just like putting body paint on. Honestly it’s been kind of a strange but useful anti-self harm tactic. Take care of yourselves out there. None of this shit is easy. Artist name is Inner Wilds.
item.dc:creator: ThrockTheGrass

item.title: No Work Today
item.description: After over a decade of making webcomics, we’ve learned a thing or two. One: people love to read funny stuff for free on the internet. Two: You have to peddle your wares sometimes, even if it feels weird. We post our comics for free but also have to make a living. That's where Patreon helps: Supporters get early comics, BTS content, and the satisfaction of knowing they're keeping us just functional enough to continue drawing instead of getting real jobs. https://www.patreon.com/warandpeas
item.dc:creator: Warandpeasofficial
